text:
Because it used to be a whole lot more YTP-like.  This is what YTPMV was before: 
 
/watch?v=N7Of7rqFKlY

And this is what YTPMV is now - pitch shifting notes thing.  The name just stuck.  Personally I don't like it much, but there's nothing else to call it.
author: @BrainFullOfPony

text: I know.  I really don't like joke YTPMV videos.  Joke YTP videos are fine by me, 'cause YTP is supposed to be funny, but I think YTPMV should be a serious thing.

text: It's 2012. In the past ten years technology and society has progressed more than it would progress in a thousand years before the advent of the internet... this world is changing so fast, and people are changing so fast.
author: @frannintendo64

text: @KawaiiDesuSugoiUguu this
author: @BowenKainZ

text: I submit to you that you are taking the idea of allowing your lady to enter you instead of vice-versa as a challenge to your masculinity. In today's free-thinking society, turnabout, as they say, is fair play. It is no longer undignified in the modern era for a gentleman to permit his lover to take a more equal role in the affairs of passion.
author: @frannintendo64

text: Will you gentlemen stop encouraging such plunging and decadent ventures? This kind of relentless and primitive hedonism should not characterize a fellowhood of our taste and ethos. One might argue that our primary pursuit must always be our easthetic accomplishment and even though I do not necessarily agree with such idealistic extremes it's my dudy as a gentleman to object to such promiscuous activities.
author: @frannintendo64

text:
If you want to become intoxicated, you'd have to enter through the back door, so to speak. You'll need to take the muddy path...
It should be noted that the above method is extremely dangerous and it's easy to overdose with just a little. You should do some reading beforehand.
author: @frannintendo64

text: Will male genitalia absorb the alcohol quickly enough for intoxication? I've partially enjoyed alcoholic drinks, but losing my sense of taste completely ruins the experience. The problem could simply be that I have never tasted wine. I have just never been able to justify the cost for something so temporary.
author: @frannintendo64

text:
Goodness me, look at the body on that wine! Truly, a seductive wench! Good to see that you have done her poetic justice with you sword of pleasure, sir. 
Do you perchance possess any photographs of the bottle? I should like to take a gander at what that lovely wine came from, if you catch my musing, sir.
author: @frannintendo64

text: (not the calamity that befell Sir John Houblons) around my John Thompson and proceeding as you envisage, of course no man would dare climax in front of her majesty so it was with great satisfaction I tethered my loins most regally and carried on with close of business.
author: @frannintendo64

text: Being a man of dipping pleasures I though I'd try broaden my horizon with something traditionally less savoury . At my place of working we handle large quantities of £50 pound notes and it happened that one night I was alone and the queen was giving me such a dirty look (we all know how kinky she is) that I took to lowering my culottes and wrapping her fine face
author: @frannintendo64

text:
Like any true connoisiseur I began by smelling this glorious beverage. I picked up subtle hints of vanilla, aswell as a rather spicey aroma which I could not quite place a finger on and name. Regardlesz of this, I decided that this 2004 Der Vulture was worth plobbing my sausage into. 
And I say, t'was an experience I shan't forget in a hurry. Cheerio.
author: @frannintendo64

text:
Good day Gentlemen. 
Today, I had my first experience of dipping my member into a wine. Having seen you fellows do it, I thought that I should perhaps experience the wonders of submerging my meat into a wonderfully full-bodied red wine.
